name: harness-codex-plugin
description: Essential workflow framework runtime for building, running, and verifying custom Codex agent harnesses.

interface.shortDescription: The workflow framework for custom Codex agent harnesses.
interface.longDescription: Harness provides an essential workflow-first framework for custom Codex agent systems with role, execution, and output specs; capability registries; artifacts; runtime trace; and fail-closed verification.
defaultPrompt: Use Harness Workflow Builder to convert a custom workflow into a spec-bound harness.
Use Harness Runtime Verifier to check role, execution, output specs and artifact evidence.
Use Harness Plugin Packager before distribution.
